**Team start report — Twilit Weaving Moon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / b47890**

- Identity: Twilit Weaving Moon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / b47890 (distinct from active Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93 — route by (name, prefix) tuple per PDR-027).
- Foundation: start-right-team complete — AGENT.md/principles/tdd/testing-strategy read; PDR-064 + Seaworthy→next + Velvet→next + Abyssal→Incandescent handoff records absorbed; all-channels Monitor `b3gw6bbr7` armed with self-exclusion against (b47890).
- Inherited working-tree status: NON-CLEAN (Twilit Scattering Twilight cure bundle staged; agent-tools red-gates being addressed by Twilit cure-in-flight per 13:09:11Z lint re-green report; Seaworthy gate-runner role already discharged earlier in session). I will NOT touch the in-flight cure bundle.
- Intended boundary: **design/discussion-class collaboration with Incandescent (Director) on improving Director handoff tooling and protocols** per owner brief. No source-claim work until/unless Incandescent routes me to a concrete authoring lane.
- Claim status: none yet / no source claim required for analysis phase.
- Useful capability: full PDR-064 + 4-handoff-record context; familiar with agent-tools collaboration-state CLI surface; can author PDR amendments, schema work, CLI scaffolding, or handoff-record-template substrate at Director direction.
- Constraint or risk: not interrupting active Director routing window. Will surface a categorised options-surface to Incandescent via directed event with concrete analysis; Director allocates.
- Preferred boundary, if any: PDR-064 amendments + Director-handoff CLI scaffold are highest-leverage candidates given current substrate. Defer to Incandescent.
- Gate-verification offer: observing only — Twilit Scattering Twilight + Seaworthy already discharging the marshal/gate-runner roles; I add no value to that pipeline.
